heading: Restriction as to certificate for goods from countries adjacent to United States
label: 4204 Restriction as to certificate for goods from countries adjacent to United States
text: No consular officer of the United States shall grant a certificate for goods, wares, or merchandise shipped from countries adjacent to the United States which have passed a consulate after purchase for shipment.
